### Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what changes and why. -->

### Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (`pytest tests/ -n auto` passes locally).
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass.
- [ ] `pyright` clean (or new noise downgraded with rationale).
- [ ] `VERSION` bumped if user-visible behaviour changed.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` if user-visible.
- [ ] `README.md` / `docs/` updated if relevant.
- [ ] No `--no-verify`, no force push to `main`.

### Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything non-obvious: tradeoffs, follow-ups, things deliberately
left out of scope. -->
